name: flow/flow-edge
description: An SVG edge with bezier/straight/smoothstep paths, an arrowhead, an optional label, and animation.

meta.name: FlowEdge
meta.description: An SVG edge with bezier/straight/smoothstep paths, an arrowhead, an optional label, and animation.

props.name: sourceY
props.description: Y coordinate of the edge’s source point.

props.name: targetX
props.description: X coordinate of the edge’s target point.

props.name: targetY
props.description: Y coordinate of the edge’s target point.

props.name: animated
props.description: When true, animates the edge path (dashed flow).

props.name: selected
props.description: Whether the edge is rendered as selected.

props.name: markerStart
props.description: Arrowhead at the source (points back toward the source) — set both for bidirectional.

props.name: markerEnd
props.description: Arrowhead at the target. Set false for an undirected line.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional CSS class names merged onto the root element.

examples.title: Edge path types
examples.description: Bezier, straight, smoothstep, and an animated edge.
examples.code:
() => (
)

examples.title: Arrow direction
examples.description: Forward (default), backward, bidirectional, or undirected — via markerStart/markerEnd.

whenToUse: Connecting two nodes with a directed path and arrowhead
Animating flow direction along a connection ("marching ants")
whenNotToUse: For undirected relationships where an arrowhead would mislead — set markerEnd={false}

antiPatterns.bad: A requestAnimationFrame loop to animate the dash
antiPatterns.why: The compositor animates CSS for free; a JS loop re-renders every frame.

intent.a11yRationale: Decorative SVG (aria-hidden); animation is disabled under prefers-reduced-motion.
